# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the modified implementation and tests (including the scope-guidance path across `engine.rs`, `review_classification.rs`, `task_prompt_contract.rs`, and related prompt-builder tests). No correctness, safety, or robustness findings met the threshold for remediation.

## Amendments

None.
